introSection: Gran Montserrat  (Japanese: グランモンセラー) is a steel roller coaster located at Parque Espana-Shima Spain Village in Shima, Mie Prefacture, Japan.

sections.title: Trains

fullText:
Gran Montserrat  (Japanese: グランモンセラー) is a steel roller coaster located at Parque Espana-Shima Spain Village in Shima, Mie Prefacture, Japan.



Light brown track and supports.

The train is designed to resemble an engine.


 * Gran Montserrat on the parks website (Japanese)
